title: solanum villosum subvar. miniatum
intro: Solanum villosum subvar. miniatum, also known as the dwarf hairy nightshade or wild black nightshade, is a small, shrub-like plant native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent, due to its rich content of alkaloids and saponins. The health benefits of Solanum villosum subvar. miniatum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and even exhibit antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although its use should be under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
